site.title: Tech & Accessories | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Get customized tech accessories showcasing your logo! Chargers, power banks, phone gadgets, Bluetooth speakers, USB, lighting & more to power up your brand.

hero.title: Tech & Accessories
hero.imageAlt: Custom branded tech accessories, chargers, and gadgets

centreText.title: Power Up Your Brand
centreText.description: Great tech items = amazing exposure. Plug into ION's power with tech gadgets, chargers & handy everyday items that keep your brand fully charged.

featureImage.imageAlt: Custom branded tech accessories and gadgets

features.title: Phone & Charging Accessories
features.description:
With great power comes great visibility! Phones & chargers are always top of mind, so why not get your logo on there? It's a win-win when you have great tech.

  • Power banks, including wireless, magnetic & multi-device options
  • Wireless charging pads & stands
  • Phone grips, including PopSockets® & holders
  • Phone wallets & stands

These are the kinds of useful promo items that are always in hand & always on display.

features.title: Audio & Headphones
features.description:
Turn up the volume on your marketing with modern, branded promo items that people love. These audio products are high-retention items used at home, work, school & on the go.

  • Bluetooth, wireless & floating speakers
  • Wireless & corded earbuds
  • Over-ear & on-ear headphones
  • Compact desk speakers

When people use them often, your brand stays close by.

features.title: Lighting
features.description:
Light up your brand with practical lights that really perform! These are simple, durable light solutions that get used in real situations, whether on the job, outdoors, or at home.

  • Flashlights
  • Outdoor lamps & lanterns
  • Keychain lights
  • Desk & portable LED lights
  • Emergency & utility lighting

They're practical, reliable & easy to keep within reach.

features.title: Office & Everyday Tech
features.description:
These are the everyday tech add-ons that round out your promo efforts & keep your brand in circulation. Check out these popular home & office accessories.

  • Mousepads
  • USB drives
  • Webcam covers & screen cleaners
  • Bluetooth trackers
  • Cable organizers

Low-cost, high-use items like these stay on desks & in daily rotation.
